title: LN8 3YN, Lincolnshire Pork Co Ltd: environmental permit issued - EPR/GP3828LK/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits  that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document  for:   Operator name: Lincolnshire Pork Co Ltd Installation name: Happylands Farm Permit number: EPR/GP3828LK/A001  "
